title: Mission to Gromas

|objective=Place a [[sequencer charge]] in the reactor<ref name="Dark Forces" />
|date=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]<ref name="Madine">{{JournalCite|6|Galaxywide NewsNets}} places the outbreak of the [[Candorian plague/Legends|Candorian plague]] on [[Dentaal]] on 36:2:12, which falls in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}} tie together the events of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], and Madine's own recollections in [[Darksaber (novel)|''Darksaber'']] as follows: upon learning of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Madine alerts the Rebel Alliance to the project's existence, thus starting the events of ''Dark Forces''. Shortly afterwards, Madine is ordered to release the Candorian plague on Dentaal, an event which is dated to 36:2:12 per the Adventure Journal. Madine vanishes into the wilderness shortly afterwards, spending a week in the jungles of Dentaal before escaping and fleeing the planet—only to be captured almost immediately by General [[Rom Mohc]] and imprisoned on [[Orinackra]]. Kyle Katarn then frees Madine from Orinackra, and Madine is then involved in the [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|battle]] at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that only a short amount of time passed between Madine telling the Alliance about the Dark Troopers and his defection. The length of time Madine spends on the run places his capture and imprisonment on Orinackra firmly in the month 36:3, or the first month of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Dark Forces'' prior to the [[mission to Orinackra]] fall in 0 ABY, and the remainder of the game and the battle at Corellia both occur in 1 ABY.</ref>

{{Quote|There's nothing delightful or hopeful about the wasteland of a Gromas moon, day or night, with its interminable red dome. Get in and get out, that's the only point. The Empire seems to get stronger and stronger regardless. The most we can give the beast is a sharp pain in the backside.... Maybe there's a bright side after all.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
[[Kyle Katarn]] undertook a '''mission''' to [[Gromas/Legends|Gromas]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
After [[Kyle Katarn]] infiltrated the facility of [[Fest/Legends|Fest]] and stole a [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]] alloy, [[Jan Ors]] tracked its sources and ended up at the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Gromas/Legends|Gromas]]. She thought that the Imperial mines on [[Gromas 16]] were related to the project.

==The mission==
Katarn descended toward the moon, but was immediately spotted by the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] supplement of the base. Skirmishing among the laser shots, he followed the mine's tunnels.

[[File:PhaseIDarkTrooper-Gromas-DFRemaster.png|thumb|left|220px|[[Kyle Katarn]] encounters a [[Phase I Dark Trooper|Phase I dark trooper]] for the first time.]]
He eventually ended up in the reactor room, and placed a [[sequencer charge]] in the [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|Thermal exhaust port]]. This action, however, triggered a security system and unleashed a [[Phase I Dark Trooper|Phase I dark trooper]], the first time Katarn finally encountered the long-heard droid, but not the last.

Katarn was able to vanquish the primal stage of the droid and hurried to the exit, where he appointed to meet with Ors and the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''. As the ''Crow'' ascended far from the planet, the [[Gromas Mines]] exploded which, as Ors hoped, would bring a setback to [[Rom Mohc]]'s plans.

==Aftermath==
[[File:CrixMadineCaptured-DF.png|230px|thumb|Following Katarn's success on Gromas, Crix Madine's defection was discovered.]] 
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] abandoned Gromas after Katarn's assault, leaving the skeleton of their base. However by that time, [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]]'s defection started to be obvious and he was finally captured by [[Rom Mohc]], who sent Madine to the [[Imperial Detention Center]] on [[Orinackra]], where he awaited execution.

[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] expressed his doubt to Mohc, explaining the threat that Kyle Katarn proved to be for the General and how he was proving to be more capable than his Dark Troopers, but Mohc dismissed Vader's implied threat and employed the services of bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to prevent Katarn from reaching the Arc Hammer.
